title: Derivative Type
description: What kind of derivative content an episode represents relative to its source episode. The source episode_id must reference an episode within the same response.

enumDescriptions.clip: Short excerpt from the source episode
enumDescriptions.highlight: Editorially curated best-of segment from the source episode
enumDescriptions.recap: Summary of the source episode's content
enumDescriptions.trailer: Promotional content for the source episode
enumDescriptions.bonus: Supplementary content (behind-the-scenes, extended interviews, deleted segments)
